exclusions_or_filters: Test set is the Round-1 deployment EXCLUDING Hz_NH23 (n = 14). The 15-molecule deployment yield is reported separately and must NOT be used as the conformal test denominator.
Calibration set is the pre-Round-1 labeled target subset (n = 19); it is the split-conformal calibration set, NOT the DFT 5-anchor TDDFT calibration.
visualization_caveats: Conformal-90 test coverage is 5/14 = 35.7%. With n_test = 14 (< 30) this point estimate has a wide Wilson 95% CI of [0.163, 0.612].
Coverage bars at every nominal level must carry the small-sample caveat: n_test = 14 only; CI overlap with nominal does NOT prove calibration.
Bootstrap intervals achieve nominal coverage but at much wider intervals (see width columns); show both coverage AND width to avoid misleading the reader.
manuscript_claims_allowed: Split-conformal calibrated on n = 19 pre-Round-1 molecules; tested on n = 14 Round-1 deployments (Hz_NH23 excluded by design).
Conformal-90 test coverage 5/14 = 35.7% (Wilson 95% CI [0.163, 0.612]) is well below the nominal 90% level, indicating distribution shift between the calibration and deployment subsets.
Bootstrap intervals achieve nominal coverage but at substantially wider intervals than the conformal intervals.
manuscript_claims_not_allowed: Do not report conformal coverage without stating n_test = 14 and the small-sample CI.
Do not use the 15-molecule deployment denominator for any conformal coverage statement (use 14).
Do not claim the conformal predictor is well-calibrated from a single coverage point estimate; cite the Wilson CI.
